Approach

A calm, transparent process from the first sketch to the final design. Considered houses with a clear identity — in person in Jeddah or remotely across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf — with eco-conscious practice at the core of every decision.

What we offer

Architectural concept

Early massing studies and spatial scenarios that shape the home’s identity — a clear architectural language, considered proportions and a precise response to the site.

Interior direction

Room sequencing, material atmosphere and the use of natural light — design decisions that keep the experience coherent and integrated.

Build-ready design

Clear deliverables that align consultants and contractors, and design guidance that protects the project’s original vision.

Eco-conscious direction

Passive design solutions that reduce energy loads from the earliest stages, and guidance on durable, low-impact materials for long-term value.

The villa design path before the paid agreement

  1. 01

    Free call to review the plot

    A review of the plot and lifestyle goals, with a clear definition of the home you want to live in.

  2. 02

    Free preliminary concept

    We discuss the initial direction on a video call before any commitment — an architectural concept and interior atmosphere aligned with your priorities.

  3. 03

    Paid agreement only after alignment

    If the direction is right, we move into the agreement and detailed design — a design package that leads consultants and contractors with clarity.

We begin with a free call and a free preliminary concept — a paid agreement starts only once the direction is clear and aligned.

Ready to review your plot?

A free call, then a free preliminary concept — we only begin a paid agreement after the direction is clear and aligned.

Send plot details WhatsApp
WB Studio

A personal architecture practice for private villas and homes across Jeddah, Saudi Arabia and the Gulf — shaped by clarity, restraint and long-term value.
